pages.title: Service Pistol
pages.text: The Glock 17 accepts 9mm ammunition and holds 17 rounds. In survival, this pack does not automatically reload an empty weapon. Use the configured Reload Gun control.

pages.title: Finding a Replacement
pages.text: Firearms are not manufactured in this pack. Locked city caches can contain a weapon, but the chance is deliberately low. Treat every working firearm as equipment worth extracting and storing safely.
